name: Tomato-Guacamole Cups
recipeIngredient: 2 very ripe avocados, pitted and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tops off the cherry tomatoes and set aside.
2. Scoop out the centers of the tomatoes with a paring knife or small end of a melon baller. Save the tomato tops for garnishing.
3. Chill the hollow tomatoes until ready to fill.
4. In a blender, whip together the avocado and sour cream.
5. Add the chopped onion, guacamole mix, lemon juice, and cayenne pepper to the blender.
6. Fill the tomato cups generously with the mixture using a pastry bag fitted with a plain 1/2-inch tip, or use a teaspoon.
7. Top each cup with a sprinkle of sunflower seeds and cap with the reserved tomato tops.
8. Refrigerate until serving time.
Special Hint: To prevent the tomatoes from rolling, trim a paper-thin slice from the bottom of each tomato before filling.
